narrative:
Precinct Streetsboro 3-A (precinct in Portage County) has 624 registered voters, with 67.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
